title: docs(ci): CI-RED-015 re-witness closure — 43 stale failures proven resolved on main
intent: Reconcile the CI-RED-015 ledger to reality. The row recorded 43 failing tests from a 2026-06-16 snapshot; the clusters were closed piecemeal since. Re-witness (not re-implement): recover the exact 43 from the stale run's failed-job log, prove each runs and passes on main 13aabe4f with per-cluster anti-suppression checks, and close 015 + 015-H. Route endpoint-consolidation debt to CI-RED-016 and canonical-authority migration to GOV-CONVERGE-007. No production code changes.

diff_articulation.what_changed: (1) SPRINTS.md: CI-RED-015 top row OPEN->CLOSED with the re-witness evidence and residual routing; 015-H sub-row OPEN->CLOSED with the geometry-authority resolution and the C2 caveat marked resolved. (2) docs/handoffs/CI_RED_015_REWITNESS_CLOSURE.md: full per-cluster resolution table, CI + local evidence pinned to SHA 13aabe4f, and the anti-suppression proof. (3) this per-PR CBSP21 manifest.
diff_articulation.why_not_redundant: The ledger said 43 failed while CI shows green; without this reconciliation the largest stale red stays on the board. Closure is witnessed per cluster (each of the 43 runs and passes, none deleted/skipped/xfail'd) rather than inferred from suite-green, so it cannot be reopened by a hidden suppression.

commands_run: gh run view 27630309072 --log-failed -> recovered exactly 43 FAILED node IDs @ c41fc656
clean worktree off origin/main (13aabe4f): pytest <17 files> -rsxX -v -> 464 passed, 1 unrelated env-skip, 0 failed, 0 errors
all 43 method defs present in current source (0 renamed-away); test_solve_all_supported_specs still parametrized over 4 specs; test_registered_operation_works PASSED (conditional skip did not fire)
static diff c41fc656..13aabe4f of all 17 test files: no deletions, no new blanket suppression
aggregate CI on 13aabe4f: Core CI (Consolidated) run 28755048990 success + API Tests run 28755048968 success

files.intent: Close CI-RED-015 and 015-H by re-witness; route residuals to 016 and GOV-CONVERGE-007.
Durable per-cluster witness with SHA-pinned CI + local evidence and anti-suppression proof.
Per-PR CBSP21 manifest declaring the ledger-closure patch.
